name: faq
description: A list of question-and-answer pairs, rendered as an accessible accordion. Introduced by an optional section heading.

question.description: The question (h3, acts as the disclosure trigger).

responsive.lg: Single column, capped at the reading measure.

a11y.headingLevel: h2 for the section; each question is h3.
notes: Each disclosure uses a button as the trigger, with aria-expanded and aria-controls linking to its answer panel.
Questions remain reachable and readable when collapsed; the accordion is keyboard-operable.

elementor.notes: Compiles to the Elementor Accordion/Toggle widget; each item is a heading trigger + answer panel.

mapping.items: Accordion items, one per Q&A pair
mapping.question: Item title (button trigger, h3)
